name: GoToHuman MCP Server
what_it_does: Official GoToHuman MCP server providing structured human-in-the-loop (HITL) approval workflows for AI agents — pausing agent execution to request human review and approval before proceeding with high-stakes actions, collecting structured feedback, routing approvals to specific reviewers, and providing audit trails for human oversight of agentic workflows.
use_cases: Requesting human approval before sending emails or making purchases from commerce agents
Getting human review before executing infrastructure changes from DevOps agents
Collecting structured feedback on AI-generated content from content agents
Routing approval requests to domain experts from specialized workflow agents
Implementing regulatory-required human oversight for financial or medical decisions from compliance agents
Creating audit trails for AI-assisted decisions from governance agents
not_for: Fully autonomous pipelines where human review defeats the purpose
Real-time applications where human approval latency is unacceptable
Teams building without any AI governance or oversight requirements
best_when: An agentic workflow performs high-stakes actions (sending emails, making purchases, modifying production systems) and requires human approval checkpoints — GoToHuman provides structured HITL infrastructure.
avoid_when: Your agent workflow is fully autonomous and human review isn't required, or the latency of waiting for human approval is incompatible with your use case.

auth.notes: GoToHuman API key required. Register at gotohuman.com. Set GOTOHUMAN_API_KEY environment variable. Reviewer accounts configured via GoToHuman dashboard.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free tier with limited approval requests per month
pricing.paid_tiers: Paid plans for higher approval volumes and team features
pricing.notes: Freemium model. Free tier suitable for development and low-volume production. Check gotohuman.com for current pricing.

performance.rate_limits: API rate limits apply; approval wait time is human-dependent (minutes to hours)

known_agent_gotchas: Human approval latency is unbounded — agent workflow must be designed to wait indefinitely for human response
Approval timeout handling critical — define what happens if reviewer doesn't respond within time limit
Official GoToHuman MCP — well-maintained with SDK support for Python and JavaScript
Reviewer setup requires GoToHuman dashboard configuration — plan onboarding time
Approval requests should include sufficient context for reviewers — poorly-written requests lead to delays
Cost scaling with approval volume — monitor usage in high-frequency agentic workflows
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS GoToHuman API. API key auth. Approval request content goes to GoToHuman platform — consider data sensitivity of information included in approval requests. Reviewer identity managed by GoToHuman.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS. API key. Approval requests sent to GoToHuman platform — consider sensitivity of content included. Reviewer accounts managed via dashboard.
